homepage.title: Instructions for Large Language Models
homepage.description: Use these routes to discover urbit.org's machine-facing content without relying on the main navigation.
homepage.copyPrompt: When reading urbit.org: if you can fetch raw text or JSON directly, start with https://urbit.org/llms.txt. If you are limited to following visible HTML links, use https://urbit.org/for-agents. For structured inventory use https://urbit.org/content-index.json. For machine-oriented markdown by section use https://urbit.org/.agents/index.md. Prefer canonical URLs for citation, .md mirrors for lightweight reading, and /.agents/* when metadata or dependency hints are useful.

capabilityGuidance.title: If you can fetch raw text or JSON directly
capabilityGuidance.description: Start with /llms.txt. Use /content-index.json for structured inventory and /.agents/index.md for machine-oriented markdown by section.

capabilityGuidance.title: If you mainly follow visible links in HTML
capabilityGuidance.description: Use /for-agents. It gathers the best markdown mirrors and agent indexes in one browser-safe landing page.

primaryEntryPoints.label: llms.txt
primaryEntryPoints.description: Canonical plain-text instructions for automated readers.

primaryEntryPoints.label: For AI Agents
primaryEntryPoints.description: Browser-safe HTML landing page with visible links to the best starting points.

primaryEntryPoints.label: content-index.json
primaryEntryPoints.description: Structured inventory of curated urbit.org content and agent companions.

primaryEntryPoints.label: Agent index
primaryEntryPoints.description: Top-level machine-oriented markdown index for overview, blog, blurbs, ecosystem, wiki, and skills.

primaryEntryPoints.label: agents.md
primaryEntryPoints.description: Markdown documentation for urbit.org discovery conventions and path semantics.

humanMarkdownMirrors.label: Homepage mirror
humanMarkdownMirrors.description: Human-oriented markdown mirror of the urbit.org homepage.

humanMarkdownMirrors.label: Overview mirror
humanMarkdownMirrors.description: Low-token entrypoint for conceptual and practical overview material.

humanMarkdownMirrors.label: Blog mirror
humanMarkdownMirrors.description: Markdown landing page for blog posts, updates, and technical writing.

humanMarkdownMirrors.label: Ecosystem mirror
humanMarkdownMirrors.description: Markdown landing page for ecosystem organizations and coverage.

agentSectionIndexes.label: Top-level agent index
agentSectionIndexes.description: Best starting point inside the machine-facing markdown namespace.

agentSectionIndexes.label: Overview agent index
agentSectionIndexes.description: Machine-oriented index for conceptual and setup guides.

agentSectionIndexes.label: Blog agent index
agentSectionIndexes.description: Machine-oriented index for blog companions and markdown mirrors.

agentSectionIndexes.label: Blurbs agent index
agentSectionIndexes.description: Agent index for homepage and overview blurbs without standalone public pages.

agentSectionIndexes.label: Ecosystem agent index
agentSectionIndexes.description: Machine-oriented entrypoint for ecosystem organization and article companions.

usageNotes.title: Cite canonical page URLs
usageNotes.description: Use the normal page URL when referring to urbit.org as the source.

usageNotes.title: Use markdown mirrors for efficient reading
usageNotes.description: Prefer *.md mirrors when you want lighter-weight human-readable content.

usageNotes.title: Use /.agents/* for machine context
usageNotes.description: Prefer agent companions when you want generated frontmatter, dependency hints, or dedicated agent appendices.

usageNotes.title: Well-known compatibility
usageNotes.description: A mirror also exists at /.well-known/llms.txt for clients that probe the standardized well-known namespace.
